post.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout Session in setup mode to collect payment method details. Returns a session URL that the frontend should redirect the user to. After the user completes the setup, use the update-payment-method endpoint to set it as default.

canSubmitAnotherA2pSubmission.description: Whether the workspace can submit another A2P verification (max 3 total submission attempts).

brandEditAllowed.description: Whether the Brand section is editable. True only when brand status is 'DRAFT'.

addressEditAllowed.description: Whether the Address section is editable. True only when brand status is 'DRAFT'.

trustProductEditAllowed.description: Whether the TrustProduct section is editable (always false).

failureReason.description: Failure or rejection reason, if any

businessName.description: Business name for the toll-free verification

contentType.description: Content type of the image to upload

files.description: Agent files array. If provided, files not in this array will be removed and their vector DB chunks deleted

calendlyUrl.description: Calendly scheduling URL for the agent

vectorFileId.description: Unique ID linking this file to chunks in the vector database

chunksIndexed.description: Number of chunks indexed in the vector database

lastMessageAt.description: Timestamp of last message in conversation

recentMessage.description: Most recent message content (smsContent or content)
recentMessage.example: Hey there! Can we talk tomorrow?

lastMessageStatus.description: Status of the most recent message

lastMessageStatusReason.description: Status reason of the most recent message

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID for AI interactions

conversations.description: List of conversations matching the search criteria

metadata.description: Search metadata showing hits per field

workingHours.description: Working hours configuration as JSON string

fromEmails.description: List of sender email addresses to monitor for leads

example.otherDetails: Would like to reconsider in the future

plan.description: The plan identifier or name associated with the subscription

amount.description: Invoice total amount (in smallest currency unit)

successUrl.description: URL to redirect to after successful payment method setup

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect to if user cancels the setup

paymentMethodId.description: Stripe payment method ID to set as default

incomingMessage.description: Full incoming message (e.g. email body) for the agent to process

recentMessage.example: Hey there! Can we talk tomorrow?

total.description: Total count of leads (conversations) in range

previousTotal.description: Total count in the previous comparison period

chartData.description: Daily counts for the last 30 days

previousUnsubscribeRate.description: Previous period unsubscribe rate as percentage

chartData.description: Daily unsubscribe rate data for chart

code.description: Authorization code received from authorization endpoint

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI used in authorization request

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier for enhanced security

state.description: OAuth2 state parameter for CSRF protection

workspace_id.description: ID of the workspace to authorize for Zapier access

approve.description: Whether the user approves the OAuth2 authorization

success.description: Whether the OAuth2 consent was approved

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect the user to (Zapier callback or error page)

code.description: OAuth2 authorization code (only present if approved)

error.description: Error message if consent was denied or failed (only present if not approved)

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID for which a new SMS message arrived

isNewLead.description: True when this is the first message from this customer (new lead)

conversationFrom.description: Conversation "from" value (Texto side) for the lead notification; used to look up the conversation record

conversationTo.description: Conversation "to" value (lead side) for the lead notification; used to look up the conversation record

leadSummary.description: Lead summary text for the notification (typically the incoming message body)

meta.description: Optional metadata for the lead. Can be any JSON-serializable value (object, string, number, etc).

connected.description: Whether Zapier integration is connected (has at least one conversation with source Zapier)
